findings.description: The code example in s5 declares `Map person;` as the loop variable, but the source file has `Person person;` at that position. The knowledge file silently corrected what appears to be a copy-paste error in the source documentation. Regardless of intent, the knowledge file now shows code that does not exist in the source.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `try (ObjectMapper<Map> mapper = ObjectMapperFactory.create(Map.class, inputStream, config)) { Person person; while ((person = mapper.read()) != null) {` — knowledge file renders the same block with `Map person;` instead.
